ops.text: Durable artifacts (the /tmp working paths in prior entries are purge-bound; these attachments carry the bytes): verdicts.jsonl = all 16 adversarial-verify + critic verdicts (full text); lane-findings.tgz = the Claude-side mining lanes' findings.json files (redo wave + record lanes + discovery r2). The codex-lane wave-1 findings live under ~/.cache/codex-ask/runs/codex-root.1514880397/<lane>/findings.json (per-user cache, not /tmp — survives reboots but not cache cleans; the catalog + these attachments carry everything load-bearing).
